response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack/web developer with broad language exposure but lacks the core requirements for this embedded security role: no demonstrated C programming for UNIX in a professional embedded context (only a brief NI LabWindows/CVI stint in 2014-2015), no Linux kernel modification experience, no embedded networking or LAN-switch background, and no security-specific work (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal). Critically, the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency, which is not listed — only English, Romanian, and basic German. This is a hard disqualifier regardless of other skills.
strengths: 13+ years of professional software development experience across diverse stacks
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a C IDE product
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing focus)
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency — hard requirement not met
No Linux kernel modification, embedded firmware, or LAN-switch experience
No security domain experience (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, tamper detection)

key_factors.factor: Native Japanese language requirement not met
No security or networking domain background
